dataCloudChurnRisk.title: Data Cloud Churn Risk
dataCloudChurnRisk.description: Verified-only risk signal from Account augmentation.

dataCloudFavoriteCategory.title: Data Cloud Favorite Category
dataCloudFavoriteCategory.description: Verified-only category affinity from Account augmentation.

dataCloudNextBestAction.title: Data Cloud Next Best Action
dataCloudNextBestAction.description: Verified-only next-best-action guidance from Account augmentation.

dataCloudSegment.title: Data Cloud Segment
dataCloudSegment.description: Verified-only customer segment from Account augmentation.

emailConsent.title: Email Consent
emailConsent.description: The customer's STORED marketing consent (captured on the website). Never ask for consent in chat — let this value drive behavior: true = may offer discounts/email follow-ups; false/unknown = help but do not market or push opt-in.

isReturning.title: Is Returning
isReturning.description: True if the shopper has purchased before.

preferences.title: Saved Preferences
preferences.description: The shopper's saved coffee preferences as JSON (likes, dislikes, roast, format, brew). Honor these and NEVER recommend a disliked item.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: A short summary of the shopper's history, saved preferences, and verified-only Data Cloud augmented context.
